textByHash.105ed2692cfa2dc8e2a4408cd4a017502fcfdde1: It was like a jungle on his chin!
textByHash.15c54d9b6702a06acd76627e653b177c83f12cca: Exchuse me... I am lishning to my good friend.
textByHash.1b20b9fee632b446a0eeaf849da526c6ded6b292: Gah! Trolls everywhere. There's no escape!
textByHash.27987ebe044cd4a6600babe3d2820130140de68b: I fear the outside. I fear the big light.
textByHash.3006b2a6ca257606c665b4627b3315dd5ea46fc7: His beard used to get into everyone's dinner.
textByHash.31c2325acdc557d8ce1bc8fa93c21725bf90b146: He could hardly climb a ladder without tripping.
textByHash.7ab13155b96e7565d5a8a5a6ae33c8d5f7eef284: I've been here for two days straight. When I close my eyes I see rocks.
textByHash.7fe5105352b8e54f5021495eafbf88be9dcb7010: In the summer he didn't need clothes.
textByHash.947af07aeb89f267d0a8e486b5bd6c03678f1df3: Such a long beard it reached the floor!
textByHash.a727a84b821d7d2af93e8099f07b2069c682d884: Exchuse me... I am trying to tell my verrry good friends 'bout my uncle's bushy beard.
textByHash.aebccdcfe17b733e8a7c82415351b35998214828: He had the bushiest beard ever!
textByHash.b0d9a3759173264ae8e34bf37c6d934ccabe3065: Oh, I'd never thought of that.
textByHash.b36a3462ca81028c48d21405f214050f64078880: He was the hairiest dwarf in town.
textByHash.baae9475b707db7eb7a8f55167a80ccf46ad24ec: I don't know, I've never thought about it. Ask my Dad, he taught me the song.
textByHash.c0e9e056cd3a578777cc97078dee18590a2d39f2: His wife could use it for a blanket.
textByHash.ea0e45bab965c6e1a943dd4d2974c2ed90091068: Bah! I resist your attempts at jollity.
textByHash.ea11f3f25f5490eba5a08365afee10b0ae21b473: I mean, he needed to clean it more.
textByHash.f6025c02c6854b97f132d1310740ac24ebda12a0: The beard wasn't so clean after meals.
textByHash.f9d2e1596dbc58bfb4010987a314cf621aa7b854: Exchuse me... I am trying to tell my verrry good friends 'bout the biggest bull I ever raised.
